attributes.title: [Redis OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Redis instance health and performance: memory usage, connection counts, command throughput, keyspace hit rate, replication status, and persistence metrics.

params.markdown:
## [Redis OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of Redis health and performance:
- Memory usage and fragmentation ratio
- Connected clients and command throughput
- Keyspace hit rate and eviction activity
- Replication status and replica count
- Connection rejections and persistence metrics

query.esql:
TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.clients.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS clients = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.clients.connected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.clients.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS clients = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.clients.connected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.commands IS NOT NULL
| STATS cmd_rate = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.commands))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.commands IS NOT NULL
| STATS cmd_rate = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.commands))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.connections.rejected IS NOT NULL
| STATS rejected = SUM(INCREASE(redis.connections.rejected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.connections.rejected IS NOT NULL
| STATS rejected = SUM(INCREASE(redis.connections.rejected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.keys.evicted IS NOT NULL
| STATS evicted = SUM(INCREASE(redis.keys.evicted))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.keys.evicted IS NOT NULL
| STATS evicted = SUM(INCREASE(redis.keys.evicted))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.rss IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.peak IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used)), mem_rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.rss)), mem_peak = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.peak)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.rss IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.peak IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used)), mem_rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.rss)), mem_peak = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.peak)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.commands IS NOT NULL
| STATS cmd_rate = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.commands)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.commands IS NOT NULL
| STATS cmd_rate = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.commands)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.clients.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS clients = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.clients.connected)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.clients.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS clients = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.clients.connected)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.keyspace.hits IS NOT NULL OR redis.keyspace.misses IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.keyspace.hits)), misses = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.keyspace.misses))
| EVAL hit_rate_pct = CASE(hits + misses > 0, TO_DOUBLE(hits) / TO_DOUBLE(hits + misses), 0.0) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 1, _gauge_goal = 0.9

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.keyspace.hits IS NOT NULL OR redis.keyspace.misses IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.keyspace.hits)), misses = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.keyspace.misses))
| EVAL hit_rate_pct = CASE(hits + misses > 0, TO_DOUBLE(hits) / TO_DOUBLE(hits + misses), 0.0) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 1, _gauge_goal = 0.9

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE redis.connections.received IS NOT NULL | STATS conn_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.connections.received)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL conn_type = "received" ) ( WHERE redis.connections.rejected IS NOT NULL | STATS conn_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.connections.rejected)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL conn_type = "rejected" )
| STATS combined_rate = AVG(conn_rate) BY time_bucket, conn_type
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE redis.connections.received IS NOT NULL | STATS conn_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.connections.received)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL conn_type = "received" ) ( WHERE redis.connections.rejected IS NOT NULL | STATS conn_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.connections.rejected)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL conn_type = "rejected" )
| STATS combined_rate = AVG(conn_rate) BY time_bucket, conn_type
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.keys.evicted IS NOT NULL OR redis.keys.expired IS NOT NULL
| STATS evicted_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.keys.evicted)), expired_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.keys.expired)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.keys.evicted IS NOT NULL OR redis.keys.expired IS NOT NULL
| STATS evicted_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.keys.evicted)), expired_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.keys.expired)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.slaves.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.slaves.connected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.slaves.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.slaves.connected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.latest_fork IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_us = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.latest_fork))

| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.latest_fork IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_us = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.latest_fork))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.net.input IS NOT NULL OR redis.net.output IS NOT NULL
| STATS input_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.net.input)), output_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.net.output)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.net.input IS NOT NULL OR redis.net.output IS NOT NULL
| STATS input_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.net.input)), output_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.net.output)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.db.keys IS NOT NULL
| STATS keys = MAX(redis.db.keys), expires = MAX(redis.db.expires), avg_ttl = AVG(redis.db.avg_ttl) BY db = attributes.db
| SORT keys DESC
| LIMIT 16

FROM metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.db.keys IS NOT NULL
| STATS keys = MAX(redis.db.keys), expires = MAX(redis.db.expires), avg_ttl = AVG(redis.db.avg_ttl) BY db = attributes.db
| SORT keys DESC
| LIMIT 16

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.clients.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.clients.blocked))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.clients.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.clients.blocked))
